compounds.frequency: twice weekly initially, progressed to 1mg every 6 days by week 4

benefits.description: Lost 14kg over 17 weeks, targeting 4kg more to reach goal weight

side_effects.description: No appetite suppression felt in early protocol

protocol_notes: Started at 0.25mg twice weekly, increased to 0.5mg twice weekly after 2-3 weeks. Advanced to 1mg every 6 days after 4 weeks. At 17 weeks, protocol at 4.0mg per week. User notes very sensitive to dosing and recommends starting low. Emphasizes prioritizing protein intake. Self-designed protocol to account for being leaner than typical obese user base.
